sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (value String, scaled_value Decimal(18, 4));
INSERT INTO test_decimal (value, scaled_value) VALUES ('123.4567', toDecimal64OrZero('123.4567', 4));
UPDATE test_decimal SET scaled_value = toDecimal64OrZero(value, 2) WHERE value = '123.4567';
SELECT value, scaled_value FROM test_decimal WHERE scaled_value = toDecimal64OrZero('999.9999', 4);
